mapper.update: UPDATE bluenote_comment.comment_like SET like_status = 'ACTIVE', liked_at = #{likedAt}, canceled_at = NULL, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND like_status = 'CANCELED'
mapper.select:
SELECT id, comment_id, comment_user_id, user_id, like_status, liked_at, canceled_at, created_at, updated_at FROM bluenote_comment.comment_like WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND like_status = 'ACTIVE' AND comment_id IN
#{commentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bluenote_comment.comment_like WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND like_status = 'ACTIVE'
